content.en:
Another hundreds of millions of yuan years have passed.

The human race has given birth to many ultimate powerhouses, and the ultimate system of the superdimensional realm has also been improved, making their combat effectiveness no less than that of ordinary Nine Realm powerhouses.

However, for the Terrans, mastering the Abyssal Ultimate-Dimensional Killing Moves was a difficult problem, and they were easily disturbed by the Extra-Dimensional Realm Ultimate-Dimensional Killing System, so they were unable to create the Ultimate-Dimensional Killing Moves.

For example, his son Ye Xingchen, the ultimate polarization of the Yuan Star has reached the limit, but because he can't create the ultimate dimensional killing move of the Yuan Star System, he has not broken through so far.

"Maybe find a special dimensional heaven and earth, and it is the kind that has just been born not long ago, and has not yet given birth to the ultimate system, I will guide that dimensional heaven and earth to take the path of the ultimate system, let the human race enter it, and develop and expand the abyssal star ultimate system. Perhaps, it will be easy to create the ultimate dimensional killing move of the Abyss Ultimate System!"

So, Ye Tian began to look for such a new dimension heaven and earth.

The dimensional heaven and earth recorded by the Void Heaven Palace must not meet the standard, those dimensional heaven and earth rules have already been formed, and they cannot be changed, and it is estimated that the ultimate realm master will not be able to do it.

He was in some places that had not been explored by 860 to find the new dimensional world.

Time flies.

Ye Tian searched for too many places, and sometimes even fell into some dangers, and finally on this day, he found a newborn dimensional heaven and earth.

There are no living beings in this dimensional heaven and earth, and even the rules have not really been formed, but he can't get in.

"Very good, this dimensional heaven and earth are very suitable!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Therefore, his replica body was left here to prevent other strong people from taking a fancy to it.

Then, he found a fragment of the Abyssal Star, then moved it and threw it directly into this dimensional heaven and earth.

In this way, this dimensional heaven and earth will continue to clash with the abyssal star fragments, and eventually merge, so that the rules of this dimensional heaven and earth will continue to be transformed into the rules of the abyssal star dimension.

When the time comes, send another group of human races into this dimensional heaven and earth, take the path of the abyssal star system, and even guide some other creatures to be born.

Next, he began to do so.

After a long time, this dimensional heaven and earth began to gradually merge with the fragments of the Abyssal Star, and the Ultimate Rule of the Abyssal Star was born.

He waited (baaf) for a few more years before returning to the Terrans.

Immediately, he found a group of Terrans, these Terrans were following the Abyss Star System, but their cultivation was not high.

Ye Tian talked about the matter of that dimensional heaven and earth.

"Are you willing to enter that dimensional world?"

He had to consult these peoples.

Except for a few Terrans, all Terrans were willing to go in.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian took these terrans to this dimensional heaven and earth, and then sent them in.

And after they enter, their strength will be suppressed, and the extra-dimensional realm system will not be able to cultivate, nor can they use it, they can only use the Yuanxing Ultimate System.

Moreover, Ye Tian also let a few powerhouses of the ultimate Abyss Star System enter, also to manage those human races.

But before they broke through to the Ultimate Lord Realm, there was no way to get rid of this dimensional world.

"This dimensional heaven and earth will be called the abyss heaven and earth in the future!"

Ye Tian said.

The rules of the Abyss Heaven and Earth have not yet been completely stabilized, Ye Tian's strength is too strong, although he can forcibly enter the Abyss Heaven and Earth now, it is undoubtedly not the best time.

He needed to wait for the rules here to truly stabilize before he could enter the Abyssal Realm.

In this way, unconsciously, hundreds of millions of yuan years have passed.

At this time, the Abyssal Heaven and Earth had already grown stronger, and he could even deduce that many human races were born there, all of which were conceived by entering the Abyss Heaven and Earth.

"The world of the abyss is almost stable, you can go in and have a look!"

A copy of Ye Tian's body entered the Abyss Heaven and Earth, although the suppression was very powerful, it was not like the situation where he was not allowed to enter at the beginning.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian descended, except for the Yuanxing system, no other forces could be used.

The world of the abyss.

Terran Temple.

Ye Tian descended here, and the few ultimate powerhouses sitting here said respectfully when they saw Ye Tian: "Ancestor!"

"How is the development of the world of the abyss?"

Ye Tian asked.

"In addition to the human race, are there any other native creatures born here?" Ye Tian asked again.

"Dozens of races have been born!" the Ultimate Powerhouse said, "According to the requirements of our ancestors, we deliberately guided them and did not destroy them. Nowadays, these races have also developed, and even the ultimate powerhouses have been born. However, they only have two ultimate powerhouses. "

Subsequently.

Ye Tian knew a lot of things again, and he almost understood the development of the Abyss Heaven and Earth.

"Next, I will let more Terran Ultimate Strength come over, and your goal is still to create your own Ultimate Dimensional Killing Move. Only by comprehending the ultimate dimensional killing moves, can you easily break through to the ultimate master, and your combat power is comparable to that of the existence of the peak of the Nine Realms. Ye Tian said.

"Yes, Ancestor!"

Several ultimate powerhouses responded one after another.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian brought his son Ye Xingchen and some other ultimate powerhouses here, allowing them to enter the Abyss Heaven and Earth as well.

Only in this way would they be able to go further in the Abyssal Heaven and Earth and devote themselves to the cultivation of the Abyssal Star Ultimate System.

After a long time.

The development of the Abyssal Heaven and Earth has grown stronger, and more and more Extreme powerhouses have been born, all thanks to Ye Tian's ability to take out a large number of Abyssal Star Secret Methods and Ultimate Killing Moves, allowing them to learn from them.

In other dimensional worlds, those ultimate lords would not do this, because they were afraid that there would be strong people threatening their rule.

But Ye Tian was not afraid of this problem, the more ultimate masters of the human race, the happier he would be.

this day.

Ye Xingchen finally comprehended an ultimate dimensional killing move, and came to inform Ye Tian as soon as possible.

The interior of the Abyssal Heaven and Earth Human Temple.

In front of Ye Tian, Ye Xingchen performed this ultimate dimensional killing move.

I saw that Ye Xingchen used the pure body of the Abyss Star and his hand as the blade, instantly breaking through the air and slashing out, slashing out all his strength, and a sword light tore through the void of the Abyssal Heaven and Earth, and its terrifying power far surpassed other killing moves.

"Father, this is my ultimate dimensional killing move-Abyss Blade!"

But this move was blocked by Ye Tian's fingers, but Ye Tian was very happy, because this had indeed reached the level of the ultimate dimensional killing move.

"Xingchen, you are very good, you can go to the ultimate master realm!"

Ye Tian smiled.
